description_long: This object is a dark, stone-like pagoda structure with a highly tiered, symmetrical roof design, characteristic of traditional East Asian religious architecture. The pagoda sits on a broad, stepped base and features multiple stacked levels, each with slightly protruding eaves. At the apex, there is a prominent ornamental finial, adding to its vertical emphasis. Adjacent to the pagoda is a rectangular, boxy structure that appears to be a modern utility or storage unit, contrasting with the ornate, historical style of the pagoda. The overall appearance is imposing and monumental, with a matte, slightly rough surface texture and a monochromatic dark gray coloration.
description: A dark, multi-tiered stone pagoda with a prominent finial, paired with a modern rectangular utility box. The structure is monumental and features traditional East Asian architectural elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical, tiered pagoda with the rectangular utility box in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the pagoda's tiers and the full length of the utility box.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pagoda's stacked roof levels and stepped base, with the utility box not visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pagoda's profile and the utility box on the right.
